title: Frozen Flowers
description: Gives flowers frozen variants in snowy biomes.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Frozen Flowers** is an experimental resource pack that gives flowers a snowy variant using Continuity and Polytone to make them biome dependant. Tinted foliage was unable to be added because of limitations.


![Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fa66b49032f32e9bda3abbc30537784ac421bf8_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Affected Biomes</summary>

- Snowy Plains
- Ice Spikes
- Snowy Taiga
- Grove
- Snowy Slopes
- Frozen Peaks
- Jagged Peaks
- Frozen River
- Frozen Ocean
- Snowy Beach
</details>

<details>
<summary>Flower Types</summary>

- Allium
- Azure Bluet
- Dandelion
- Orange Tulip
- Oxeye Daisy
- Pink Tulip
- Poppy
- Red Tulip
- Sweet Berry Bush
- Whtie Tulip

More planned


</details>
